data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Tvardi Therapeutics investors. Contact James Wilson if significant losses occurred.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have experienced substantial losses in Tvardi to reach out to him directly for a consultation on their available options. If you are an investor who has incurred notable losses in Tvardi stock or options and are interested in exploring your legal avenues, Wilson welcomes you to contact him directly for assistance.

data.title: Cell therapy technologies market to reach $7.91 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 12.4% from $4.41 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on December 11, 2025, it was reported by MarketsandMarkets™ that the Cell Therapy Technologies Market is expected to increase from approximately USD 4.41 billion in 2025 to USD 7.91 million by 2030, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.4%. The market data includes 500 tables and 45 figures spread across 470 resources.

data.title: Penn National Insurance President & CEO to retire in July 2026, John Foster to take over, Randal Mancini named Senior VP.
data.description: Robert Brandon, President & CEO, is set to retire in July 2026. John Foster, Senior Vice President of Insurance Operations, will succeed him as President & CEO and join the board of directors. Randal Mancini has been appointed as the new Senior Vice President of Insurance Operations. The company made this announcement on Dec. 11, 2025, in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania.

data.title: Franchise consulting firm unveils 4 reasons why franchisees fail, offering solutions to avoid pitfalls.
data.description: In Shohola, Pennsylvania on December 11, 2025, The Perfect Franchise, a prominent U.S. franchise consulting firm, unveiled a recent study highlighting the main causes behind the challenges or failures faced by franchisees. The analysis presents four key reasons contributing to such struggles, offering potential franchise owners effective measures to evade these obstacles. This insightful release aims to assist individuals in the franchise industry in navigating common pitfalls, potentially lowering the failure rate amongst franchisees.

data.title: CPSC announces recalls for TREK electric bicycles due to fall or crash hazard. Visit www.cpsc.gov for more details.
data.description: Today, Washington-based CPSC disclosed several recalls in collaboration with select companies. The information includes the recall of TREK electric bicycles because of potential fall or crash risks (26-138). Details on all recalls can be accessed at www.cpsc.gov.

data.title: Metallurgical test results confirmed at Tanbreez refinery JV in Romania, with Professor Tony Tang appointed as independent reviewer.
data.description: Renowned academic Tony Tang has been named as the independent reviewer for metallurgical test work, process design, and related studies. With extensive expertise in the field, Professor Tang will evaluate critical aspects of metallurgical processes, including testing methodologies and design strategies. His role is pivotal in ensuring the accuracy and efficiency of these processes. This appointment comes at a crucial time, with the industry witnessing a surge in demand for rigorous testing and optimization. Professor Tang's vast experience and knowledge will be instrumental in enhancing the quality and reliability of metallurgical processes.

data.title: Fuel retailers, biodiesel producers, and home heating industry back biodiesel blenders' tax credit bill.
data.description: In Alexandria, Virginia on December 11, 2025, several major organizations have joined forces to advocate for the U.S. travel plaza and truck stop industry. This coalition includes NATSO, which represents these facilities nationwide, as well as SIGMA: America's Leading Fuel Marketers, the National Association of Convenience Stores (NACS), the National Energy & Fuels Institute (NEFI), and Sustainable...

data.title: Global precision cancer treatments market surged by $211 billion due to platform-based approaches; FDA oncology approvals show industry shift.
data.description: GT Biopharma, Inc. announced in Vancouver, BC on December 11, 2025, that November saw a surge in FDA oncology approvals, indicating a trend towards platform-based precision therapies instead of broad-spectrum treatments. This shift highlights the global focus on anticancer advancements.

data.title: REAL Shows Network (RSN) adds Selling 215 - Made in Philly TV series, focused on real estate and lifestyle in Philadelphia.
data.description: On December 10, 2025, in Philadelphia, REAL Shows Network (RSN) announced the addition of a new series called Selling 215 - Made in Philly to its lineup. This locally hosted show in Philadelphia, PA aims to showcase real estate and lifestyle stories. RSN, a national TV platform, focuses on highlighting these narratives and increasing their visibility.

data.title: CPSC warns consumers to stop using HiQiLi Wintergreen Essential Oil due to serious risk. Visit www.cpsc.gov for details.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, the Consumer Product Safety Commission issued a safety alert advising consumers to discontinue the use of HiQiLi Wintergreen Essential Oil due to potential serious risks. Detailed product safety warnings and recalls are accessible at www.cpsc.gov. Consumers are urged to heed this warning to avoid any potential dangers associated with the product.

data.title: Sports Geek launches weekly betting podcast Geek'd Up Bets hosted by ex-college players. Episodes every Thursday 6 PM ET.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in Houston, The Sports Geek introduced Geek'd Up Bets, a weekly sports betting podcast featuring ex-college football athletes now analysts Joe DeLeone and Sean Anderson. The podcast releases new episodes every Thursday at 6 PM Eastern Time, providing in-depth analyses and insights for sports betting enthusiasts.

data.title: Gas supply prices in Northern Illinois have increased by 15-56%, with Nicor Gas and Peoples Gas planning rate hikes. Advocates warn of affordability crisis for families and seniors.
data.description: Prior to an anticipated rate increase filing by Peoples Gas, consumer advocates have outlined the current situation of gas customers in the Chicago region. They are raising concerns about an impending affordability crisis for numerous families and senior citizens. According to a recent analysis, the data indicates that...

data.title: Investor deadline near. Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP probing Freeport-McMoran investor claims. Call James Wilson if impacted between Feb 15, 2022 - Sep 24, 2025.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who incurred losses in Freeport-McMoran to reach out to him directly for a consultation regarding their options. If you bought or obtained securities in Freeport during the period from February 15, 2022, to September 24, 2025, and experienced financial losses, Wilson advises seeking guidance.

data.title: Thomas Filardo becomes co-managing partner at Warshaw Burstein alongside Frederick R. Cummings, Jr. Cummings served 15 years previously. Filardo's role commences December 1, 2025.Characters: 133
data.description: Thomas Filardo has officially taken on the role of Managing Partner at Warshaw Burstein, LLP as of December 1, 2025. He succeeds Frederick R. Cummings, who held the position for 15 years. Filardo, previously serving as the Chair of the Litigation Practice Group, has transitioned into this new role within the firm based in New York.

data.title: Spanish authorities crack down on group tied to crypto ‘wrench attack’ murder, arresting 5 and charging 4 in Denmark.
data.description: Five individuals have been apprehended in connection to a homicide and abduction that took place in April. Additionally, four individuals have been formally accused in Denmark in relation to the same incident.

data.title: Electro Switch names Shawn Smith CEO and Matt Yopchick CFO. New leadership in WEYMOUTH, Mass.
data.description: In Weymouth, Massachusetts, there has been a recent change in leadership at Electro Switch. Shawn Smith has been appointed as the new CEO and Matt Yopchick as the new CFO of the company.

data.title: Investors of Sprouts facing deadline. Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigating claims. Contact James Wilson if suffered losses. Stock purchased between June 4, 2025, and October 29, 2025.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a partner specializing in securities litigation at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Sprouts to reach out to him directly for a potential discussion on their alternatives. If individuals bought or obtained securities in Sprouts within the period of June 4, 2025, to October 29, 2025, and are interested in exploring their options, they are encouraged to contact him.
